changes.transaction: Milwaukee Brewers placed 1B Andrew Vaughn on the 10-day injured list retroactive to March 27, 2026. Left hamate fracture.
Chicago Cubs placed LHP Matthew Boyd on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 3, 2026. Left biceps strain.
Durham Bulls placed 1B Tre' Morgan on the 7-day injured list.
Tampa Bay Rays optioned SS Carson Williams to Durham Bulls.
